title: aster lateriflorus var. grandis
intro: Aster lateriflorus var. grandis, also known as the large-flowered yellow star, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. Consuming Aster lateriflorus var. grandis is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving headaches, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of herbal remedies.
